summary: Completed testing of tenant data isolation for user search/messaging and Activity CRUD operations. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Verified: 1) User search correctly returns only users from the authenticated user's tenant, 2) Conversations endpoint works for Murphy Shark users, 3) Activity CRUD (Create/Read/Update/Delete) works for tenant admins, 4) Cross-tenant access is properly denied.

details: Murphy Shark admin (epinker@icloud.com) search returns only Murphy Shark users (3 users found)
Ormond admin (admin@ormond.com) search returns only Ormond users (3 users found)
Cross-tenant search isolation verified - Murphy admin cannot see Ormond users and vice versa
User search endpoint: GET /api/admin/users/search uses get_tenant_db_for_user dependency for proper isolation
Murphy Shark admin can access conversations endpoint
Murphy Shark student can access conversations endpoint
Ormond admin can access conversations endpoint
All messaging endpoints use tenant-specific database (get_tenant_db_for_user)
Murphy Shark admin can create activities
Activity types validated (sports, clubs, cultural)
Invalid activity type correctly rejected with 400
Murphy Shark has 5 activities
Single activity retrieval works correctly
Activity description and meeting_times can be updated
Updated fields persist correctly
Activities with no members can be deleted
Deleted activities return 404 on subsequent GET
Non-existent activity returns 404
Ormond admin cannot access Murphy Shark activities (403)
Murphy Shark admin cannot access Ormond activities (403)
Super admin can access any tenant's activities

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ User search endpoint correctly uses get_tenant_db_for_user for tenant isolation
✓ All messaging endpoints use tenant-specific database
✓ Activity CRUD endpoints properly check tenant_code against user's tenant
✓ Super admin bypass works correctly for cross-tenant access
✓ Activity type validation implemented (sports, clubs, cultural)
✓ Delete protection for activities with members implemented
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data. Test activities created during tests are cleaned up automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tenant data isolation and Activity CRUD fully tested and working. Key findings: 1) User search uses get_tenant_db_for_user dependency for proper tenant isolation, 2) Murphy Shark tenant has 3 users and 5 activities, 3) Ormond tenant has 3 users, 4) All CRUD operations for activities work correctly, 5) Cross-tenant access properly denied with 403 status.
